title: Charles Chihinga v New Future Financial Company Limited (2020/CCZ/003) [2021] ZMCC 23 (29 November 2021)
case_name: Charles Chihinga v New Future Financial Company Limited
issue_tags: national values and principles (Articles 8 & 9) guide interpretation but are not independently justiciable
Constitutional Court limited to matters of constitutional interpretation or alleged contraventions (Article 128)
contractual/statutory disputes fall outside Constitutional Court’s original jurisdiction.
outcome_detail: Consequently, the petition is forthwith dismissed for want of jurisdiction
